Israeli Strike Kills Two in Gaza Humanitarian Zone
— S3 · Conflict · Khan Younis, Gaza Strip, Palestine · 6m ago. An Israeli airstrike hit the Mawasi area of Khan Younis, killing two and injuring several others, setting tents ablaze.
15-Year-Old Palestinian Killed in Israeli Raid in West Bank
— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 2h ago. Israeli forces killed a 15-year-old Palestinian during a raid in the West Bank, escalating tensions in the region.
